summary: Stage Identity UI testing complete. All 8 features tested and verified working correctly. StageIdentityBadge shows 'Staff' on Employees page and 'Applicant' on Recruitment page. ApplicantStageBanner displays correctly on Compliance File tab for applicants with all required elements.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error - pre-existing issue from iteration_98
Returns 404 for some employees - pre-existing issue

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 2 staff members and 10 applicants
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage Identity UI feature is complete. StageIdentityBadge component uses data-testid='stage-badge-applicant' and 'stage-badge-employee'. ApplicantStageBanner uses data-testid='applicant-stage-banner' and 'approve-recruitment-btn'. The banner appears on Compliance File tab for applicants and lists 5 requirements before recruitment approval.

stage_identity_badge_component.details: Component renders correctly with 'applicant' (blue) and 'employee' (green) variants

staff_page_badges.details: Found 2 'Staff' badges on Staff page (EmployeesPage.js) - one for each employee

recruitment_page_badges.details: Found 10 'Applicant' badges on Recruitment Pipeline page - one for each applicant

applicant_stage_banner_display.details: ApplicantStageBanner displays on Compliance File tab when viewing an applicant's profile

applicant_stage_banner_status.details: Banner shows 'Applicant Stage' header with 'Application Received' status badge

applicant_stage_banner_requirements.details: Banner lists all 5 required items: Right to Work, Identity, DBS check, 2 references, Proof of address (2 documents)

approve_recruitment_button.details: 'Approve for Recruitment' button found with data-testid='approve-recruitment-btn', visible and enabled

approve_button_navigation.details: Clicking button navigates to Recruitment tab (?tab=checklist) with toast message 'Review all requirements below, then use Approve Recruitment action'

data_testids_verified.applicant-stage-banner: FOUND - on Compliance File tab for applicants

code_review_notes.StageIdentityBadge.js: Well-structured component with proper data-testid, size variants, and icon support
code_review_notes.ApplicantStageBanner.js: Comprehensive banner with status labels, requirements list, and conditional approve button
code_review_notes.EmployeesPage.js: Correctly uses person_stage || stage_identity || 'employee' fallback at line 754-758
code_review_notes.RecruitmentPage.js: Correctly uses person_stage || stage_identity || 'applicant' fallback at line 246-248
code_review_notes.EmployeeProfilePage.js: ApplicantStageBanner imported at line 24 and used in Compliance File tab
